toolsSection.title: Popular Tools
toolsSection.subtitle: Our most used free online tools

whySection.title: Why ToolsFlow?
whySection.intro: ToolsFlow is a free platform offering Turkey-specific financial calculation tools. Calculate salary, loan payments, VAT, severance pay and investment returns in seconds — with up-to-date tax brackets and rates.
whySection.feature1Desc: Calculations use 2026 income tax brackets, SSI premium ceilings and minimum wage amounts. Data is updated every new period automatically.
whySection.feature2Desc: All tools are free and require no registration. Your data is processed in your browser and never sent to any server. Your privacy matters to us.
whySection.feature3Desc: We show every calculation step, not just the result. SSI deduction, income tax, stamp tax — each item is listed separately.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.a1: Yes, all our tools are completely free. No registration or membership required.
faqSection.a2: Yes, calculations use 2026 tax brackets, SSI premium ceilings and minimum wage amounts.
faqSection.a3: All calculations happen in your browser. No data is sent to or stored on any server.
faqSection.a4: Salary calculator, loan calculator, VAT calculator, severance pay calculator, investment calculator, currency converter, BMI calculator, QR code generator and image compressor.

tools.title: Free Online Tools
tools.description: Free, fast and secure online tools for your everyday needs. All processing happens in your browser.

qr-code-generator.name: QR Code Generator
qr-code-generator.description: Create QR codes instantly from URLs, text or contact information. Download in PNG and SVG formats.

bmi-calculator.name: BMI Calculator
bmi-calculator.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI). Enter your height and weight to learn your health status.

image-compressor.name: Image Compressor
image-compressor.description: Compress your images without losing quality. JPEG, PNG and WebP formats supported.

currency-converter.name: Currency Converter
currency-converter.description: Convert currencies with real-time exchange rates. 150+ currencies supported.

salary-calculator.name: Salary Calculator
salary-calculator.description: Calculate net salary from gross. Detailed breakdown of SGK, income tax, stamp tax and employer cost. Updated 2026 tax brackets for Turkey.

loan-calculator.name: Loan Calculator
loan-calculator.description: Calculate monthly payments based on loan amount, interest rate and term. Full amortization schedule with KKDF and BSMV.

vat-calculator.name: VAT Calculator
vat-calculator.description: Calculate VAT inclusive or exclusive prices. Supports Turkish VAT rates of 1%, 10% and 20%. Batch calculation mode.

severance-calculator.name: Severance Pay Calculator
severance-calculator.description: Calculate your severance pay. Detailed calculation based on employment duration, gross salary and current ceiling.

investment-calculator.name: Investment Calculator
investment-calculator.description: Calculate investment returns with compound interest. Monthly contributions, inflation adjustment and scenario comparison.

guides.title: AI Guides
guides.description: Detailed reviews, comparisons and usage guides about AI tools.
